field_acquisition_ranking.objective: Choose the next exact CUDA observation by expected improvement, expected information gain, and variational descent after KKT/Pareto/byte-closure blockers are explicit.

objective: J = expected_total_score_delta + lambda_byte*g_byte + lambda_seg*g_seg + lambda_pose*g_pose + lambda_confidence*g_confidence

research_basis.contract: Research priors may shape planning, features, and atom ranking, but they cannot promote, rank, or claim contest score without byte-closed exact CUDA archive evidence.

sources.charged_byte_contract: Selection channels and side information must be reproducible from charged archive payload or fixed contest code.
sources.title: Perturbed Quantization Steganography with Wet Paper Codes

sources.charged_byte_contract: Per-atom distortion costs are planning weights until encoded in a byte-closed archive and scored exactly.
sources.title: Minimizing Additive Distortion in Steganography Using Syndrome-Trellis Codes

sources.charged_byte_contract: Any learned decoder, latent, hyperparameter, or selector that affects inflate output must be inside archive.zip or fixed contest code.
sources.title: End-to-end Optimized Image Compression

sources.charged_byte_contract: Hyperprior side information is charged unless it is fixed contest runtime code.
sources.title: Variational image compression with a scale hyperprior

sources.charged_byte_contract: Coder tables and compressed streams are charged; external libraries cannot be sidecar dependencies.
sources.title: constriction entropy coders

sources.charged_byte_contract: Detector-informed allocation can rank atoms, but the selected archive payload and any detector-derived tables must be charged or fixed.
sources.title: Secure Payload Scaling in Detector-Informed Batch Steganography: The Mismatched Detectors Case

sources.charged_byte_contract: Multi-scale feature tensors and fusion weights are charged archive payload unless fixed in contest runtime.
sources.title: MSNeRV: Neural Video Representation with Multi-Scale Feature Fusion

sources.charged_byte_contract: Class representations, label maps, and codebooks must be charged or derived from fixed contest code.
sources.title: Universal Rate-Distortion-Classification Representations

sources.charged_byte_contract: Geometric transport costs can rank pose/foveation atoms, but any pose stream, flow field, or selector consumed by inflate must be deterministic and charged.
sources.title: Geometric Visual Servo Via Optimal Transport

trainable_surrogate.determinism_contract: training may choose archive atoms, but emitted archive bytes and inflate behavior must be deterministic and byte-closed
trainable_surrogate.equation: J_theta = score_delta_theta + lambda_rate*byte_violation_theta + lambda_seg*seg_violation_theta + lambda_pose*pose_violation_theta + lambda_conf*confidence_violation_theta
